hero.eyebrow: Digital Excellence From Egypt To The World
hero.title: Turning Ideas
hero.description: Mobile applications, websites, AI solutions, and digital experiences — crafted with precision and built to grow your business.

services.label: What We Do
services.title: Services That
services.subtitle: From strategy to launch, we deliver digital products built for performance, scale, and lasting impact. Every pixel. Every interaction. Every line of code.

web.title: Web Development
web.desc: High-performance websites and web apps built with modern frameworks. Fast, secure, and scalable solutions tailored to your business needs.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps
mobile.desc: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android. Smooth, intuitive, and built to delight users from the first tap.

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.desc: User-centered interfaces that balance beauty and function. We design experiences that feel effortless and convert visitors into customers.

ai.title: AI Solutions
ai.desc: Intelligent automation, smart systems, and AI-powered features that streamline operations and unlock new possibilities for your business.

custom.title: Custom Software
custom.desc: Tailored software solutions built around your exact workflows. From internal tools to full platforms — engineered for scale and longevity.

strategy.title: Digital Transformation
strategy.desc: Roadmaps, audits, and digital transformation consulting. We help you make confident decisions about your technology investments.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce
ecommerce.desc: Online stores built to sell. We build and optimize e-commerce platforms for conversions, performance, and seamless checkout flows.

shield.title: Maintenance & Support
shield.desc: Your product needs ongoing care. We offer proactive monitoring, updates, and technical support so your digital presence always performs.

innovation.title: Innovation First
innovation.desc: We stay ahead of the curve — integrating AI, modern frameworks, and emerging tech to give your product a genuine competitive edge.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Built In
accessibility.desc: Technology should serve everyone. Accessibility and inclusive design are core to every product we build — not an afterthought.

ux.title: User Experience
ux.desc: Beautiful interfaces that actually convert. We design for real humans — mapping every touchpoint to delight, clarity, and action.

scalability.title: Scalability & Performance
scalability.desc: Code architecture that grows with you. Speed, reliability, and clean structure built from day one — ready for your next 10x.

founder.quote: I believe that technology should do more than power businesses — it should solve meaningful problems and create lasting impact. That belief is what drives everything we build at Tut Wonders.
founder.name: Michael Fathy
founder.title: CEO & Founder, Tut Wonders

process.label: How We Work
process.title: From Idea to Launch,
process.subtitle: A transparent, collaborative process designed to get your project right — the first time.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.desc: We listen deeply to understand your goals, users, and constraints. The right brief shapes everything that follows.

strategy.title: Strategy & Design
strategy.desc: Wireframes, prototypes, and a visual direction that aligns your brand with user needs.

development.title: Development
development.desc: Clean, scalable code. Agile sprints with regular check-ins so you're always in the loop.

testing.title: Testing & QA
testing.desc: Cross-device testing, performance audits, and security checks before anything goes live.

launch.title: Launch & Grow
launch.desc: Smooth deployment, onboarding support, and ongoing maintenance to keep you ahead.

items.text: Tut Wonders transformed our digital presence completely. The website they built is fast, beautiful, and our conversions have doubled since launch.
items.name: Sara El-Sayed

items.text: Professional team with real attention to detail. Our mobile app was delivered on time and the code quality is excellent.
items.name: Mohammed Ali

items.text: They understood our brand from the very first call. The UI/UX work they delivered felt like magic — our users love it.
items.name: Lina Karim

items.text: Outstanding communication throughout the project. They gave us honest advice and pushed back when our ideas weren't optimal. That's rare.
items.name: Ahmed Farouk

items.text: The maintenance plan they set up has saved us countless hours. Issues get resolved before we even notice them.
items.name: Yasmine Nasser

items.text: Highly skilled developers who actually care about your business outcome, not just completing the scope. A true partner.
items.name: Omar Hassan

cta.title: Ready to Build Something Extraordinary?
cta.subtitle: Let's turn your vision into a digital wonder.

apply.title: Build the Future
apply.subtitle: We're looking for talented people who love what they do. If that's you, tell us about yourself.

flexible.title: Flexible Working Hours
flexible.desc: Remote-first culture with async communication and flexible schedules.

impact.title: Real Projects, Real Impact
impact.desc: Ship products used by thousands — not side exercises or fake demos.

team.title: Collaborative Team
team.desc: Work alongside designers, developers, and strategists who care about craft.

summary.label: Professional Summary
summary.placeholder: Tell us about your experience, skills, and what you bring to the team…

notice.title: After submitting, you'll be asked to email your
notice.extra: We'll give you a pre-filled email draft — one click to send. (please send from your email in cv and include any additional notes in the email body)

success.title: Application Received
success.message: Thank you, {name}! Your application has been submitted. Expect a reply within 3–5 business days.
success.filesTitle: One last step — send your files
success.filesMessage: Please email your CV / Resume and National ID (front & back) to us. Use your ref code as the subject so we can match it to your application.
success.subject: Application Files – {ref}

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: We'd Love to
contact.subtitle: Have a question, a quick thought, or just want to say hello? Drop us a message and we'll get back to you within one business day.

footer.description: Digital solutions built with the precision of ancient craftsmen and the power of modern technology. From Egypt, for the world.

bot.welcome: Hi there! 👋 Welcome to Tut Wonders. I'm here to help you kick off your project — I'll ask you a few questions so our team can put together a tailored proposal for you. To start, what's your name?

confirm.title: Here's your project brief. Ready to send it to the team?

bot.success: Your project brief has been sent to the Tut Wonders team! 🎉 We'll review your {service} inquiry and get back to you within 24 hours. We look forward to building something great together.
bot.error: Apologies, I hit a snag. Please check your API key configuration or try again in a moment.
